top_issues.title: OTIF at MegaMart dropped to 91% in Q2 — projected $4.2M Q3 chargeback exposure
top_issues.detail: Eight-week slide from 94.6 to 91.0 OTIF driven by late-delivery (44% of charge dollars) and short-ship (24%). MABD misses concentrated on Joliet to Bentonville lane. Retailer-compliance agent has flagged 318 at-risk shipments in the next 14 days; proposed actions include re-routing through Cardinal-Southeast-DC and splitting two orders.

top_issues.title: Bullseye JBP volume commitment under-attained by 7% — top-to-top in 14 days
top_issues.detail: Annual volume commitment 48.0M cases; pacing 44.6M. Endcap support pacing 11 of 14 weeks. Customer team prepping recovery plan: Lumen Vit-C Serum velocity ahead of plan offsets a portion; Marquee Argan needs a fresh feature in Wk22.

top_issues.title: Phantom OOS detected on Morning Field flagship at RiverGrove — 280 stores affected
top_issues.detail: POS units collapsed to 41K vs 122K forecast at the same on-hand inventory; demand-sensing agent flags shelf-presence failure rather than true OOS. Replenishment hold released to RiverGrove DC; merchandising notified.
